mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND DELETED = 0
AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
SELECT SEQ, USER_ID, PASSWORD , PASSWORD_RESET, LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME , CREATE_DATETIME, CREATE_IDX , UPDATE_DATETIME, UPDATE_IDX FROM TB_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND DELETED = 0 AND USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT SEQ, USER_ID , PASSWORD_RESET, LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME , CREATE_DATETIME, CREATE_IDX , UPDATE_DATETIME, UPDATE_IDX FROM TB_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND SEQ = #{seq}
SELECT COUNT(SEQ) > 0 FROM TB_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId}
